titleEn: Retrofit autonomy grows up: Planning software, sensor fusion and consolidation reshape the sector
titleZh: 改装自动驾驶技术走向成熟：规划软件、传感器融合与行业整合重塑农业赛道
summaryZh: 本文指出，农业自动驾驶改装套件已从单一辅助工具进化为集传感器、云连接与实时规划软件于一体的完整自动驾驶平台。以AgXeed VCU及其TraXwise平台为例，展示了如何通过前置路线规划与实时监控，让现有拖拉机实现自主作业。文章还提到《未来农业自动驾驶改装套件目录》已更新，新增多款产品，反映出该领域技术整合与市场加速的趋势。
translationZh:
自动驾驶改装套件已悄然转变为一个技术类别，正在重塑农场对劳动力、机械投资和田间作业的思考方式。它正演变为更接近完整的自动驾驶平台，集成了传感器、云连接以及能够实时规划、监控和调整田间作业的软件。为突出几项新进展，《未来农业自动驾驶改装套件目录》现已更新。新增产品包括AgXeed VCU，这是一款自动

featuredReason: 该新闻聚焦于大田作物领域的自动驾驶改装技术，与智慧畜牧中种植业环节的自动化、智能化趋势高度相关，且AgXeed等产品的软件平台化思路对行业有重要参考价值。
contentFull:
Retrofit autonomy grows up: Planning software, sensor fusion and consolidation reshape the sector

 13-07 | Autonomous/semi-autosteering systems | Article

Behind the VCU sits TraXwise, AgXeed’s own planning and monitoring platform, which lets a farmer or manager plan an entire working route in advance. Photo: AgXeed

Autonomous retrofit kits have quietly shifted into a technology category that is reshaping how farms think about labour, machinery investment and field operations. It is turning into something closer to a full autonomy platform, layered with sensors, cloud connectivity, and software that plans, monitors and adjusts field work in real time. To highlight several new developments, the Future Farming Autonomous Retrofit Kits Catalogue has now been updated. A new addition is the AgXeed VCU, an auto
